name: bong-marketplace
description: Team-shared Claude Code skills for Nori HRM and future projects

plugins.name: view-memory
plugins.description: Scans a project's existing frontend and distills design tokens, component patterns, and file conventions into project memory so new screens stay visually consistent without re-reading every stylesheet. Portable across projects and stacks.

plugins.name: review-code
plugins.description: Pre-commit review of uncommitted diffs: flags naming/abbreviation/boolean/comment/file-naming convention issues, debug residue, hardcoded values & secrets, merge conflict markers, temporary/dead code, logic & edge-case risks; runs the project's compile/type-check; and checks Git hygiene (commit message, tracked files, commit size). Portable across languages and stacks.

plugins.name: dependency-reuse-check
plugins.description: Before adding a new dependency/library/package to a project's manifest, prove existing dependencies and the standard library can't do the job, state an explicit covered/not-covered verdict, and ask before adding. Defaults to no-add; scopes need to the actual requirement, not hypothetical edge cases. Portable across languages and stacks.

plugins.name: design-mockup
plugins.description: Extracts design tokens (colors, typography, spacing, radius, shadows) from an HTML file, image, or page URL and generates a single self-contained mockup HTML (token legend + fixed sample screen set) to preview how a UI built with that design would look. Portable, no project-specific values.
